case_title: GOLDEN GATE UNIVERSITY A CORP FIN AID OFFICE VS STURLA LANCE

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT STURLA LANCE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $705.18 FILED BY GOLDEN GATE UNIVERSITY A CORP FIN AID OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT STURLA LANCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-21-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 04

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLDEN GATE UNIVERSITY A CORP FIN AID OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STURLA LANCE $661.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $661.00, SETTLEMENT REACHED PLTF AGREES TO PAY IN FULL WHEN HE RECEIVES HIS FEDERAL INCOME TAX STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
